name: Tidemark
description_short: Tidemark Federal Credit Union offers comprehensive banking, lending, and financial services to members, including checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards with competitive rates.
description_long:
Tidemark Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution operating under the credit union model, where profits are returned to members rather than external shareholders. The organization emphasizes community support and financial education, operating a charitable foundation focused on assisting disadvantaged children and families through food banks, camp programs, and school supply initiatives.

The credit union provides a full suite of consumer and business financial products. For deposits, members can access High Tide Checking (with cash back rewards), savings accounts, Money Market Accounts, and Share Certificates (CDs) offering rates up to 4% APY on checking and 3.45% APY on certificates. For borrowing, Tidemark offers personal loans, auto loans (as low as 5.59% APR), mortgage loans (as low as 5.802% with up to 100% financing options), credit cards (from 11.50% APR), and commercial loans (from 6.25% APR). The institution recently upgraded its digital banking platform and offers a mobile app for account management.

Tidemark distinguishes itself through member-focused benefits including a referral program ($100 for you, $100 for a friend, up to $500 annually), innovative mortgage products like a 5/1 ARM with free rate float-down if rates drop within five years, and active community engagement through board participation opportunities and a charitable foundation. The credit union emphasizes security education, offering resources on tech support scams and fraud prevention.

As a credit union, Tidemark's primary limitation is membership eligibility requirements (details not fully disclosed on website). The institution serves specific geographic communities with multiple branch locations that observe federal holidays. Competitive rates and member benefits position it well for those who qualify for membership, though rates and terms should be compared with other local and national options. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts (High Tide Checking with cash back)
Savings accounts and Money Market Accounts
Share Certificates (CDs) with up to 3.45% APY
Mortgage loans (up to 100% financing with float-down options)
pros: Competitive deposit rates up to 4% APY on High Tide Checking account
Mortgage financing up to 100% with innovative 5/1 ARM and free rate float-down option
Member referral program offering up to $500 annual earnings
Charitable foundation actively supporting disadvantaged children and families in communities served
Newly upgraded digital banking platform with mobile app for convenient account access
Low auto loan rates starting at 5.59% APR
Full-service credit union with personal loans, business loans, and credit cards all available
cons: Membership eligibility criteria not clearly detailed on website, suggesting potential restrictions
Limited geographic footprint with specific branch locations (not a national institution)
Credit card APR starting at 11.50% is not exceptionally competitive compared to some issuers
No mention of overdraft protection or other safety features for checking accounts
Limited information about personal loan terms, amounts, and approval requirements on website
best_for: Members eligible to join a credit union seeking competitive deposit rates and cash back rewards
Homebuyers interested in mortgage products with rate flexibility and high loan-to-value options
Borrowers looking to consolidate loans through auto financing or personal loan products
Community-minded members who want to support a credit union with active charitable giving
diagnosis: Tidemark Federal Credit Union is best for individuals eligible for credit union membership who seek competitive rates on deposits and mortgages, community-oriented banking, and member benefits like referral programs. The primary caveat is that membership eligibility is restricted (typical for credit unions based on employer, location, or other criteria), and prospective members must verify they qualify before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_description: Tidemark Federal Credit Union offers banking and lending services including checking, savings, mortgages, auto loans, and credit cards.
